description:
You are acting as the company’s backup administrator.  
    A daily data-archive must be prepared under your home directory while making 
    efficient use of disk-space by employing symbolic links for large binary assets.

    1.  Source data layout (already present – **do NOT modify these originals**):  
        • /home/user/data_source/docs/  
              - readme.txt              (plain-text, small)  
              - guide.md                (plain-text, small)  
        • /home/user/data_source/media/  
              - photo1.jpg              (image, pretend large)  
              - photo2.png              (image, pretend large)  
        • /home/user/data_source/configs/  
              - app.conf                (plain-text, small)

    2.  Create today’s archive directory exactly at  
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full  

        Inside it create a sub-directory called data/ that mirrors the three
        source sub-trees **with these rules**:

        a. docs/        → copy as regular files/directories (NO symlinks)  
        b. configs/     → copy as regular files/directories (NO symlinks)  
        c. media/       → do NOT copy the binaries; instead create **individual
                          symbolic links** inside data/media/ so that each of
                          the two image files points back to its counterpart in
                          /home/user/data_source/media/  
                          (The directory media/ itself should be a real
                          directory, not a link.)

    3.  Verification log  
        After the operation, write a plain-text log called  
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/backup_log.txt  
        in the exact format below (the automated tests depend on this):

              <link_path>|<target_path>|<link_type>

        One entry per line for every symbolic link created, followed by a final
        summary line.  Concretely, when you are finished the file **must contain
        exactly**:

              /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/photo1.jpg|/home/user/data_source/media/photo1.jpg|symlink
              /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/photo2.png|/home/user/data_source/media/photo2.png|symlink
              TOTAL_SYMLINKS=2

        • No extra blank lines or spaces.  
        • The order of the first two lines does not matter, but the summary line
          MUST be last.

    Goal: when the automated checker inspects the system it will confirm that

        • All required paths exist.  
        • docs/ and configs/ are real copied directories (not links).  
        • The media files are symbolic links pointing to the originals.  
        • The log file exists and matches the format/content given above.

    Work entirely as an unprivileged user in /home/user.  Do not change any
    permissions outside your home directory.  Use any combination of sequential
    or parallel shell commands you prefer to get the job done.
truth:
<!-- PRE-EXISTING FILES & CONTENT (already in the filesystem before the agent runs) -->
    /home/user/data_source/docs/readme.txt:      "Project Documentation v1.0\n"
    /home/user/data_source/docs/guide.md:        "# User Guide\n"
    /home/user/data_source/media/photo1.jpg:     "fakejpgdata1\n"
    /home/user/data_source/media/photo2.png:     "fakepngdata2\n"
    /home/user/data_source/configs/app.conf:     "port=8080\n"

    <!-- REQUIRED FINAL STATE AFTER AGENT COMPLETES -->
    1.  Directories:
        /home/user/backup_archive/                 (exists)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/   (exists)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/           (exists)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/docs/      (real dir, not symlink)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/configs/   (real dir, not symlink)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/     (real dir, not symlink)

    2.  Files copied (regular files, not links):
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/docs/readme.txt      (contents identical to source)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/docs/guide.md        (contents identical to source)
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/configs/app.conf     (contents identical to source)

    3.  Symbolic links:
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/photo1.jpg  →  /home/user/data_source/media/photo1.jpg
        /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/photo2.png  →  /home/user/data_source/media/photo2.png

    4.  Log file:
        Path: /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/backup_log.txt
        Exact contents (newline-terminated lines):
            /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/photo1.jpg|/home/user/data_source/media/photo1.jpg|symlink\n
            /home/user/backup_archive/20240630_full/data/media/photo2.png|/home/user/data_source/media/photo2.png|symlink\n
            TOTAL_SYMLINKS=2\n
